action.text:
mylist = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
mylist.clear() # Clear the content of the list

mylist = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry', 'kiwi', 'melon']
mylist[0] # First item
mylist[-1] # Last item
mylist[2:4] # From third to fourth item

buttons.title: Length and Type of a List

action.text:
mylist = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
mylist.append('orange') # Add an item to the end of the list
mylist.insert(<num>, 'orange') # Insert an item at <num> index

mylist = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry', 'banana']
mylist.remove('banana') # Remove the first 'banana'
mylist.pop(<num>) # Remove the item at <num> index. If <num>=0, remove the last item

mylist = [100, 50, 65, 82, 23]
mylist.sort() # Sort the list ascending
mylist.sort(reverse = True) # Sort the list descending

mylist1 = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
mylist2 = mylist1 # mylist2 is a reference to mylist1, changes made in mylist1 will auto. be made in mylist2
mylist2 = mylist1.copy() # The both lists are independent

mylist1 = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
mylist2 = [1, 2, 3]
mylist3 = mylist1 + mylist2
mylist1.extend(mylist2) # Add mylist2 at the end of mylist1
